name: copilot-evaluator
description: CSA Loom Copilot quality evaluator — timer + HTTP Azure Function (loom-next-level E2). Executes the E1 golden Q/A eval sets against the REAL Copilot retrieval + AOAI path (via the console's internal eval-probe route — byte-identical searchDocs + tier routing), gates deterministic mustMention/mustNotMention guards BEFORE the LLM judge (forbidden phrase = auto-fail, zero judge spend), enforces a daily judge-token cap, and writes scored eval-run/eval-result docs to Cosmos loom-copilot-evals. Azure-native, no Microsoft Fabric dependency.
